faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Prospect Lefferts Gardens apartment?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments take 4-8 hours for a standard apartment, with heat treatments often completed in a single day. Chemical treatments may require follow-up visits 10-14 days later to eliminate newly hatched eggs. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your daily routine while ensuring complete eradication.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in Prospect Lefferts Gardens homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments are completely safe when applied by our licensed professionals. Heat treatments are chemical-free and safe for immediate re-entry, while our EPA-approved pesticides require only a few hours of clearance time. We provide detailed safety instructions and work around your family's schedule to ensure everyone's wellbeing.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment in Prospect Lefferts Gardens?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We offer a 90-day warranty on all bed bug treatments in Prospect Lefferts Gardens.
